heading_content_part: Scope of this Privacy PolicyBy using CHARM , you agree that we may access, collect, use and share your information in accordance with this Privacy Policy, as revised from time to time. In addition, your use of CHARM signifies that you agree with the terms of this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy, do not use CHARM .

decoder_heading: Scope of this Privacy Policy
ident_heading: Scope of this Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: This Privacy Policy is incorporated into and forms part of the CHARM Terms of Service that you have agreed to in order to use CHARM . Any terms used in this Privacy Policy will have the same meaning as the equivalent defined terms in the CHARM Terms of Service unless otherwise defined in this Privacy Policy or the context requires otherwise. Unless otherwise specified in this Privacy Policy, these terms in the CHARM Terms of Service shall also be applicable in this Privacy Policy.I.

Special Note about Sensitive Personal Information

heading_content_part: To provide certain features (e.g. online video calling), we must access your microphone, camera, or location, with your permission, as described below:i)Microphone: We access the microphone on your device (with your permission) to record audio messages and deliver sound during video calls.ii)Camera: We access the camera on your device (with your permission) to take your profile pictures and deliver Realtime images during video calls.iii)

decoder_heading: Information that You have Provided and we have Collected

heading_content_part: Location: We display your current location on your profile page (with your permission) to provide personalized and optimized experience for you and other users.By using CHARM , you agree that all processing activities of sensitive personal information are for the purposes and in the manner as described in this Privacy Policy.Please note that we do not use your sensitive personal information for the purpose of making direct marketing unless agreed by you.C. How We Use the Collected InformationA. Purposes

decoder_heading: Information that You have Provided and we have Collected

heading_content_part: We may use your Information for any of the following purposes:i)to provide services to you (including both the services currently provided by us via CHARM and the services to be rendered by us via CHARM in the future);ii)to personalize and improve our services and your experiences when you use our services by, among other things, suggesting friends or profile information, or customising the content we show you, including ads;iii)

decoder_heading: Information that You have Provided and we have Collected
ident_heading: Information that You have Provided and we have Collected
heading_content_part: to respond to inquiries, for the purposes of customer service, security, archival and backup purposes in connection with providing services of CHARM ;iv)to monitor and analyse usage and trends of our services;v)to enhance the safety and security of our products and services;vi)to verify your identity and prevent fraud or other unauthorised or illegal activity;vii)to enforce our Terms of Use and other usage policies.

decoder_heading: Information that You have Provided and we have Collected
ident_heading: Information that You have Provided and we have Collected
heading_content_part: CHARM allows you to share text messages, photos, screenshots, videos and other communications in the CHARM application with other users, and if you choose to do so your text messages, photos, screenshots, videos and other communications will be stored on our servers. In addition, if you choose to share these items with other CHARM users, we may not be able to remove them from our servers or make them unavailable to anyone you have shared them with. Sending and sharing text messages, photos, screenshots, videos or other communications in the CHARM application is your decision. By choosing to share that information, you should understand that you may no longer be able to control how that information is used and that it may become publicly available (depending in part on your actions or the actions of others with whom you have shared the information). CHARM is not responsible for any use or misuse of information you share.

heading_content_part: Your information may be accessed and used by our service providers who are working with us in connection with the operation of our services. These service providers may have access to your information but only to the extent necessary to perform services on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose that information or use it for any other purposes. These providers will collect the information sent by your mobile phone, tablet or desktop computer, and their use of that information is governed by their applicable privacy policy.

decoder_heading: iii. Law Enforcement
ident_heading: iii) Law enforcement
heading_content_part: iii) Law enforcementWe may share information about you if we are (or if we believe we are) required by law or legal process (such as a subpoena, warrant or court order), if we have to respond to a lawful request from legal authorities to disclose such information, or if we need to enforce or apply this Privacy Policy, our Terms of Service or our other policies.
